description: Submit a website or file URL for quick analysis: hybrid-analysis-quick-scan-url
name: hybrid-analysis-scan

outputs.description: SHA256 hash of the file. File.SHA1 SHA1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: MD5 hash of the file. File.environmentId The environment ID of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The start time of the file analysis. File.submitname The submission name of the file.
outputs.name: File.analysis_start_time

outputs.description: A list of classification tags of the file. File.vxfamily The family classification of the file.
outputs.name: File.classification_tags

outputs.description: The total number of network connections of the file. File.total_processes The total processes count of the file.
outputs.name: File.total_network_connections

outputs.description: The total signatures count of the file. File.hosts A list of hosts of the file.
outputs.name: File.total_signatures

outputs.description: Whether the server found the file interesting. File.domains A list of domains related to the file.
outputs.name: File.isinteresting

outputs.description: Whether the file was analyzed by a URL. File.Malicious.Vendor For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: File.isurlanalysis

outputs.description: For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The DBot score vendor.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
